member.name: T:RealEstateStar.Functions.Activation.ActivationOrchestratorFunction
member.summary:
Durable Functions orchestrator for the activation pipeline.
Maps directly from ActivationOrchestrator.ProcessActivationAsync() — same 4 phases.
Replay-safety rules (enforced): - No DateTime.UtcNow — use ctx.CurrentUtcDateTime - No Guid.NewGuid() — not needed here - No I/O calls — all I/O is in activity functions - Logging is guarded by !ctx.IsReplaying

member.name: M:RealEstateStar.Functions.Activation.ActivationOrchestratorFunction.InstanceId(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Deterministic instance ID for dedup: at most one activation per agent at a time.

member.name: M:RealEstateStar.Functions.Activation.ActivationOrchestratorFunction.WrapAsync``1(Microsoft.DurableTask.TaskOrchestrationContext,System.String,RealEstateStar.Functions.Activation.Dtos.SynthesisInput,System.String,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger)
member.summary: Calls an activity and returns the typed result. Returns null on failure so one worker failure does not abort the pipeline.

member.name: T:RealEstateStar.Functions.Activation.Activities.AgentDiscoveryFunction
member.summary: Phase 1 gather activity: discovers the agent's web presence, headshot, profiles, and WhatsApp. Delegates to .

member.summary: Phase 1 gather activity: discovers the agent's web presence, headshot, profiles, and WhatsApp. Delegates to .

member.name: T:RealEstateStar.Functions.Activation.Activities.CheckActivationCompleteFunction
member.summary:
Phase 0 activity: checks whether the activation pipeline has already run by verifying all required files exist in document storage.
Mirrors the check in ActivationOrchestrator.IsAlreadyCompleteAsync. Required files must all be present for the activation to be considered complete.

member.name: M:RealEstateStar.Functions.Activation.Activities.CheckActivationCompleteFunction.#ctor(RealEstateStar.Domain.Shared.Interfaces.Storage.IDocumentStorageProvider,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{RealEstateStar.Functions.Activation.Activities.CheckActivationCompleteFunction})
member.summary:
Phase 0 activity: checks whether the activation pipeline has already run by verifying all required files exist in document storage.
Mirrors the check in ActivationOrchestrator.IsAlreadyCompleteAsync. Required files must all be present for the activation to be considered complete.

member.name: T:RealEstateStar.Functions.Activation.ActivityNames
member.summary: Canonical activity function names used by both the orchestrator and activity functions. Keeping names in one place prevents typos between caller and callee.

member.name: T:RealEstateStar.Functions.Activation.StartActivationFunction
member.summary:
Queue-triggered function that starts a new activation orchestration.
When Features:Activation:UseBackgroundService is false, the API writes an to the activation-requests queue and this function picks it up, creating a Durable orchestration instance with a deterministic instance ID that prevents duplicate runs for the same agent.
The API side queues the message; this side starts the orchestration. The feature flag is read by the API — this function always runs when a message arrives.

member.name: M:RealEstateStar.Functions.Activation.StartActivationFunction.#ctor(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{RealEstateStar.Functions.Activation.StartActivationFunction})
member.summary:
Queue-triggered function that starts a new activation orchestration.
When Features:Activation:UseBackgroundService is false, the API writes an to the activation-requests queue and this function picks it up, creating a Durable orchestration instance with a deterministic instance ID that prevents duplicate runs for the same agent.
The API side queues the message; this side starts the orchestration. The feature flag is read by the API — this function always runs when a message arrives.

member.name: T:RealEstateStar.Functions.Lead.Activities.CheckContentCacheFunction
member.summary: Checks for existing CMA and HomeSearch results. Cross-lead dedup: if the same property address was analyzed for another lead recently, the cached result is returned so the expensive CMA/HS workers can be skipped.

member.name: M:RealEstateStar.Functions.Lead.Activities.CheckContentCacheFunction.#ctor(RealEstateStar.Domain.Shared.Interfaces.IDistributedContentCache,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{RealEstateStar.Functions.Lead.Activities.CheckContentCacheFunction})
member.summary: Checks for existing CMA and HomeSearch results. Cross-lead dedup: if the same property address was analyzed for another lead recently, the cached result is returned so the expensive CMA/HS workers can be skipped.

member.name: T:RealEstateStar.Functions.Lead.Activities.CmaProcessingFunction
member.summary: Activity function that executes the CMA pipeline (fetch comps + analyze). Replaces CmaProcessingWorker (Channel-based BackgroundService). The Channel<T> backpressure is no longer needed — Azure Queue + Functions runtime auto-scales by queue depth.
member.remarks: TODO(phase-4): Mark CmaProcessingWorker for removal after this is live.

member.summary: Activity function that executes the CMA pipeline (fetch comps + analyze). Replaces CmaProcessingWorker (Channel-based BackgroundService). The Channel<T> backpressure is no longer needed — Azure Queue + Functions runtime auto-scales by queue depth.
member.remarks: TODO(phase-4): Mark CmaProcessingWorker for removal after this is live.

member.name: T:RealEstateStar.Functions.Lead.Activities.DraftLeadEmailFunction
member.summary: Drafts the lead email via . Decoupled from sending so the pipeline can checkpoint between draft and send.

member.name: M:RealEstateStar.Functions.Lead.Activities.DraftLeadEmailFunction.#ctor(RealEstateStar.Domain.Leads.Interfaces.ILeadStore,RealEstateStar.Domain.Leads.Interfaces.ILeadEmailDrafter,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{RealEstateStar.Functions.Lead.Activities.DraftLeadEmailFunction})
member.summary: Drafts the lead email via . Decoupled from sending so the pipeline can checkpoint between draft and send.

member.name: T:RealEstateStar.Functions.Lead.Activities.GeneratePdfFunction
member.summary: Generates a CMA PDF for the given lead and CMA result, then stores it via . Wraps the existing — no PDF logic lives here.
Generates a CMA PDF for the given lead and CMA result, then stores it via . Wraps the existing — no PDF logic lives here.

member.name: T:RealEstateStar.Functions.Lead.Activities.HomeSearchFunction
member.summary: Activity function that executes the HomeSearch pipeline (fetch listings). Replaces HomeSearchProcessingWorker (Channel-based BackgroundService). The Channel<T> backpressure is no longer needed — Azure Queue + Functions runtime auto-scales by queue depth.
member.remarks: TODO(phase-4): Mark HomeSearchProcessingWorker for removal after this is live.

member.name: M:RealEstateStar.Functions.Lead.Activities.HomeSearchFunction.#ctor(RealEstateStar.Domain.Leads.Interfaces.ILeadStore,RealEstateStar.Domain.HomeSearch.Interfaces.IHomeSearchProvider,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{RealEstateStar.Functions.Lead.Activities.HomeSearchFunction})
member.summary: Activity function that executes the HomeSearch pipeline (fetch listings). Replaces HomeSearchProcessingWorker (Channel-based BackgroundService). The Channel<T> backpressure is no longer needed — Azure Queue + Functions runtime auto-scales by queue depth.
member.remarks: TODO(phase-4): Mark HomeSearchProcessingWorker for removal after this is live.

member.name: T:RealEstateStar.Functions.Lead.Activities.LoadAgentConfigFunction
member.summary: Loads agent account config and maps it to .

member.summary: Loads agent account config and maps it to .

member.name: T:RealEstateStar.Functions.Lead.Activities.NotifyAgentFunction
member.summary: Sends agent notification via . Idempotency is already guarded inside the service (IIdempotencyStore with key lead:{agentId}-{leadId}:agent-notify). This activity is safe to retry — duplicate notifications are prevented at the service layer.

member.name: M:RealEstateStar.Functions.Lead.Activities.NotifyAgentFunction.#ctor(RealEstateStar.Domain.Leads.Interfaces.ILeadStore,RealEstateStar.Domain.Leads.Interfaces.IAgentNotifier,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{RealEstateStar.Functions.Lead.Activities.NotifyAgentFunction})
member.summary: Sends agent notification via . Idempotency is already guarded inside the service (IIdempotencyStore with key lead:{agentId}-{leadId}:agent-notify). This activity is safe to retry — duplicate notifications are prevented at the service layer.

member.name: T:RealEstateStar.Functions.Lead.Activities.PersistLeadResultsFunction
member.summary: Persists all pipeline artifacts for a lead via . Sets final status to Complete. Safe to retry — PersistActivity uses content-hash dedup.

member.name: M:RealEstateStar.Functions.Lead.Activities.PersistLeadResultsFunction.#ctor(RealEstateStar.Domain.Leads.Interfaces.ILeadStore,RealEstateStar.Activities.Lead.Persist.PersistActivity,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{RealEstateStar.Functions.Lead.Activities.PersistLeadResultsFunction})
member.summary: Persists all pipeline artifacts for a lead via . Sets final status to Complete. Safe to retry — PersistActivity uses content-hash dedup.

member.summary: Loads the lead and computes its lead score via .

member.name: T:RealEstateStar.Functions.Lead.Activities.SendLeadEmailFunction
member.summary: Sends the drafted lead email via . Idempotency is already guarded inside the service (IIdempotencyStore with key lead:{agentId}-{leadId}:email-send). This activity is safe to retry — duplicate sends are prevented at the service layer.

member.name: M:RealEstateStar.Functions.Lead.Activities.SendLeadEmailFunction.#ctor(RealEstateStar.Domain.Leads.Interfaces.ILeadStore,RealEstateStar.Domain.Leads.Interfaces.ILeadCommunicatorService,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{RealEstateStar.Functions.Lead.Activities.SendLeadEmailFunction})
member.summary: Sends the drafted lead email via . Idempotency is already guarded inside the service (IIdempotencyStore with key lead:{agentId}-{leadId}:email-send). This activity is safe to retry — duplicate sends are prevented at the service layer.

member.name: T:RealEstateStar.Functions.Lead.Activities.UpdateContentCacheFunction
member.summary: Stores fresh CMA and HomeSearch results in so future leads for the same property/criteria can skip the expensive analysis.

member.name: M:RealEstateStar.Functions.Lead.Activities.UpdateContentCacheFunction.#ctor(RealEstateStar.Domain.Shared.Interfaces.IDistributedContentCache,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{RealEstateStar.Functions.Lead.Activities.UpdateContentCacheFunction})
member.summary: Stores fresh CMA and HomeSearch results in so future leads for the same property/criteria can skip the expensive analysis.

member.name: F:RealEstateStar.Functions.Lead.Activities.UpdateContentCacheFunction.CmaCacheTtl
member.summary: Cache TTL for CMA results (property analysis is stable for 24h).

member.name: F:RealEstateStar.Functions.Lead.Activities.UpdateContentCacheFunction.HomeSearchCacheTtl
member.summary: Cache TTL for HomeSearch results (listing inventory changes hourly).

member.name: P:RealEstateStar.Functions.Lead.Activities.UpdateContentCacheFunction.CmaCacheTtlForTests
member.summary: Exposed for unit tests only — verifies TTL constant values.

member.name: T:RealEstateStar.Functions.Lead.LeadOrchestratorFunction
member.summary: Durable Functions orchestrator for the lead processing pipeline. Replaces RealEstateStar.Workers.Lead.Orchestrator.LeadOrchestrator (Phase 4 removes that BackgroundService).
member.remarks:
REPLAY SAFETY: This orchestrator is deterministic. It MUST NOT: - Call DateTime.UtcNow → use ctx.CurrentUtcDateTime - Call Guid.NewGuid() → use deterministic instance ID from input - Perform any I/O → delegate all I/O to activity functions - Log outside !ctx.IsReplaying guards (use [!ctx.IsReplaying] guards for expensive logs)
Instance ID scheme: lead-{agentId}-{leadId} This makes the orchestration idempotent — re-queuing the same lead re-uses the same instance.
Parallel execution: CMA and HomeSearch run in parallel via Task.WhenAll. Partial completion: each parallel task is individually try/caught so a CMA failure does not prevent HomeSearch results from being used (and vice versa).
Timeout: replaced Channel{T}.WaitAsync to ctx.CreateTimer + Task.WhenAny (replay-safe).
Backpressure: Channel{T} is no longer needed. Azure Queue Storage + Functions runtime auto-scales by queue depth. Configure host.json newBatchThreshold and maxDequeueCount to tune concurrency per Function App instance.
SignalR replacement: CMA progress streaming is not implemented in this phase. The API can proxy Durable Functions' built-in status endpoint (/runtime/webhooks/durabletask/instances/{id}) for HTTP polling. TODO(phase-4): Implement HTTP polling status endpoint on the API side.

member.name: T:RealEstateStar.Functions.Lead.Models.LeadOrchestrationMessage
member.summary: Queue message and orchestrator input for the lead pipeline. Serialized as JSON via Azure Queue Storage → Durable Functions.

member.name: T:RealEstateStar.Functions.Lead.Models.LeadOrchestratorInput
member.summary: Orchestrator input — extends with lead routing flags computed by after loading the lead.

member.name: P:RealEstateStar.Functions.Lead.Models.LeadOrchestratorInput.ShouldRunCma
member.summary: True when this lead is a Seller or Both type with seller details present.

member.name: P:RealEstateStar.Functions.Lead.Models.LeadOrchestratorInput.ShouldRunHomeSearch
member.summary: True when this lead is a Buyer or Both type with buyer details present.

member.name: P:RealEstateStar.Functions.Lead.Models.LeadOrchestratorInput.CmaInputHash
member.summary: SHA-256 hash of the CMA input (seller address fields). Used for cross-lead dedup.

member.name: P:RealEstateStar.Functions.Lead.Models.LeadOrchestratorInput.HsInputHash
member.summary: SHA-256 hash of the HomeSearch input (buyer criteria fields). Used for cross-lead dedup.

member.name: T:RealEstateStar.Functions.Lead.Models.LoadAgentConfigInput
member.summary: Input to the LoadAgentConfig activity function.

member.name: T:RealEstateStar.Functions.Lead.Models.LoadAgentConfigOutput
member.summary: Output of the LoadAgentConfig activity function. Null when the agent config is not found.

member.name: T:RealEstateStar.Functions.Lead.Models.ScoreLeadInput
member.summary: Input to the ScoreLead activity function.

member.name: T:RealEstateStar.Functions.Lead.Models.ScoreLeadOutput
member.summary: Output of the ScoreLead activity function.

member.name: T:RealEstateStar.Functions.Lead.Models.CheckContentCacheInput
member.summary: Input to the CheckContentCache activity function.

member.name: T:RealEstateStar.Functions.Lead.Models.CheckContentCacheOutput
member.summary: Output of the CheckContentCache activity function. When a cache hit is found, the result is already computed and CMA/HS can be skipped.

member.name: T:RealEstateStar.Functions.Lead.Models.CmaFunctionInput
member.summary: Input to the CmaProcessing activity function. Carries seller address info needed to fetch comps.

member.name: T:RealEstateStar.Functions.Lead.Models.CmaFunctionOutput
member.summary: Output of the CmaProcessing activity function.

member.name: T:RealEstateStar.Functions.Lead.Models.HomeSearchFunctionInput
member.summary: Input to the HomeSearch activity function. Carries buyer criteria needed to fetch listings.

member.name: T:RealEstateStar.Functions.Lead.Models.HomeSearchFunctionOutput
member.summary: Output of the HomeSearch activity function.

member.name: T:RealEstateStar.Functions.Lead.Models.GeneratePdfInput
member.summary: Input to the GeneratePdf activity function.

member.name: T:RealEstateStar.Functions.Lead.Models.GeneratePdfOutput
member.summary: Output of the GeneratePdf activity function.

member.name: T:RealEstateStar.Functions.Lead.Models.DraftLeadEmailInput
member.summary: Input to the DraftLeadEmail activity function.

member.name: T:RealEstateStar.Functions.Lead.Models.DraftLeadEmailOutput
member.summary: Output of the DraftLeadEmail activity function.

member.name: T:RealEstateStar.Functions.Lead.Models.SendLeadEmailInput
member.summary: Input to the SendLeadEmail activity function.

member.name: T:RealEstateStar.Functions.Lead.Models.NotifyAgentInput
member.summary: Input to the NotifyAgent activity function.

member.name: T:RealEstateStar.Functions.Lead.Models.PersistLeadResultsInput
member.summary: Input to the PersistLeadResults activity function.

member.name: T:RealEstateStar.Functions.Lead.Models.UpdateContentCacheInput
member.summary: Input to the UpdateContentCache activity function.

member.name: T:RealEstateStar.Functions.Lead.StartLeadProcessingFunction
member.summary: Queue-triggered function that starts the Durable Functions lead orchestration. Reads from the "lead-requests" queue, loads the lead to compute routing flags and content hashes, then schedules .
member.remarks:
Feature flag: Features:Lead:UseBackgroundService When true → this function exits immediately (BackgroundService handles it instead). When false (default for Functions host) → schedules the Durable orchestration.
Instance ID: lead-{agentId}-{leadId} Deterministic — re-queuing the same lead attaches to the existing orchestration rather than starting a duplicate. Durable Functions de-duplicates at the call.
Backpressure: Azure Queue Storage handles backpressure via queue depth and newBatchThreshold / maxDequeueCount. Channel<T> fan-out is no longer needed — the Functions runtime auto-scales by adding more instances as the queue grows.

member.name: M:RealEstateStar.Functions.Lead.StartLeadProcessingFunction.#ctor(RealEstateStar.Domain.Leads.Interfaces.ILeadStore,Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.IConfiguration,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{RealEstateStar.Functions.Lead.StartLeadProcessingFunction})
member.summary: Queue-triggered function that starts the Durable Functions lead orchestration. Reads from the "lead-requests" queue, loads the lead to compute routing flags and content hashes, then schedules .
member.remarks:
Feature flag: Features:Lead:UseBackgroundService When true → this function exits immediately (BackgroundService handles it instead). When false (default for Functions host) → schedules the Durable orchestration.
Instance ID: lead-{agentId}-{leadId} Deterministic — re-queuing the same lead attaches to the existing orchestration rather than starting a duplicate. Durable Functions de-duplicates at the call.
Backpressure: Azure Queue Storage handles backpressure via queue depth and newBatchThreshold / maxDequeueCount. Channel<T> fan-out is no longer needed — the Functions runtime auto-scales by adding more instances as the queue grows.

member.name: T:RealEstateStar.Functions.WhatsApp.ProcessWebhookFunction
member.summary:
Azure Functions queue-triggered replacement for WebhookProcessorWorker. The Functions host handles: - Dequeuing from "whatsapp-webhooks" - Poison message routing to "whatsapp-webhooks-poison" after maxDequeueCount=5 (host.json) - Message completion (deletion) on success - Message visibility reset on unhandled exception (for retry)
TODO [Phase 4]: Remove WebhookProcessorWorker (BackgroundService) from Workers.WhatsApp once feature flag Features:WhatsApp:UseBackgroundService is fully disabled in all environments.

Azure Functions queue-triggered replacement for WebhookProcessorWorker. The Functions host handles: - Dequeuing from "whatsapp-webhooks" - Poison message routing to "whatsapp-webhooks-poison" after maxDequeueCount=5 (host.json) - Message completion (deletion) on success - Message visibility reset on unhandled exception (for retry)
TODO [Phase 4]: Remove WebhookProcessorWorker (BackgroundService) from Workers.WhatsApp once feature flag Features:WhatsApp:UseBackgroundService is fully disabled in all environments.

member.name: M:RealEstateStar.Functions.WhatsApp.ProcessWebhookFunction.DeserializeEnvelope(System.String)
member.summary: Deserializes the queue message body. The Azure Queue Storage SDK encodes messages as Base64 by default (QueueMessageEncoding.Base64). The Functions worker SDK auto-decodes Base64 before passing the string to the trigger binding. If the body is still Base64 (legacy encoding), this method handles both cases.

member.name: T:RealEstateStar.Functions.WhatsApp.WhatsAppRetryFunction
member.summary:
Azure Functions timer-triggered replacement for WhatsAppRetryJob (BackgroundService). Runs every 30 minutes to retry sending welcome messages to agents who opted in but did not receive their welcome message (e.g. due to a transient WhatsApp API error).
TODO [Phase 4]: Remove WhatsAppRetryJob (BackgroundService) from Workers.WhatsApp once feature flag Features:WhatsApp:UseBackgroundService is fully disabled in all environments.

member.name: M:RealEstateStar.Functions.WhatsApp.WhatsAppRetryFunction.#ctor(RealEstateStar.Workers.WhatsApp.WhatsAppRetryJob,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{RealEstateStar.Functions.WhatsApp.WhatsAppRetryFunction})
member.summary:
Azure Functions timer-triggered replacement for WhatsAppRetryJob (BackgroundService). Runs every 30 minutes to retry sending welcome messages to agents who opted in but did not receive their welcome message (e.g. due to a transient WhatsApp API error).
TODO [Phase 4]: Remove WhatsAppRetryJob (BackgroundService) from Workers.WhatsApp once feature flag Features:WhatsApp:UseBackgroundService is fully disabled in all environments.

member.name: M:RealEstateStar.Functions.WorkerExtensionStartupCodeExecutor.Configure(Microsoft.Azure.Functions.Worker.IFunctionsWorkerApplicationBuilder)
member.summary: Configures the worker to register extension startup services.

member.name: T:RealEstateStar.Functions.FunctionExecutorHostBuilderExtensions
member.summary: Extension methods to enable registration of the custom implementation generated for the current worker.

member.name: M:RealEstateStar.Functions.FunctionExecutorHostBuilderExtensions.ConfigureGeneratedFunctionExecutor(Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting.IHostBuilder)
member.summary: Configures an optimized function executor to the invocation pipeline.

member.name: T:RealEstateStar.Functions.FunctionExecutorAutoStartup
member.summary: Auto startup class to register the custom implementation generated for the current worker.

member.name: M:RealEstateStar.Functions.FunctionExecutorAutoStartup.Configure(Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting.IHostBuilder)
member.summary: Configures the to use the custom implementation generated for the current worker.
member.param: The instance to use for service registration.

member.name: T:NullDistributedContentCache
member.summary: No-op used when AzureStorage:ConnectionString is not configured. Returns null for all Gets and discards all Sets — content cache misses are safe (pipeline still runs).

member.name: T:DisabledFunctionsWhatsAppSender
member.summary: Minimal no-op WhatsApp sender for use in the Functions host during Phase 1-2. Phase 3 will replace this with the real WhatsApp API client.

member.name: T:NullImageResolver
member.summary: No-op for the Functions host. LocalFirstImageResolver requires IWebHostEnvironment (ASP.NET Core) which is unavailable here. PDF generation proceeds without agent headshots/logos. TODO(phase-5): Replace with a Functions-compatible implementation.
